screens.notes: WI-1 DONE 2026-02-19. 19 tests. AdminListPage<Translation>, inline edit, CSV import/export, filter by category. Full CRUD wired via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND guard (brain-v2 Sprint 0 live).

screens.label: Settings
screens.notes: WI-3 DONE 2026-02-19. 19 tests. AdminListPage<Setting>, jest-axe 0 violations. GET /v1/settings + PATCH /v1/settings/{key}. Mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND (brain-v2 Sprint 5 live).

screens.label: Apps
screens.notes: WI-4 DONE 2026-02-20. 22 tests. disableApp action, AdminListPage<App>. Mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND. brain-v2 Sprint 6 delivers GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /v1/apps.

screens.label: Audit Logs
screens.notes: WI-10 DONE 2026-02-20. 16 tests. WCAG/PIPEDA viewer, AuditLogPage template. Read-only (auditor role). Mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND.

screens.label: RBAC Users
screens.notes: WI-9 DONE 2026-02-20. 21 tests. Role badge (danger/warning/neutral), Entra sync status, enabled badge. GET/POST/DELETE /v1/rbac/assignments is brain-v2 Sprint 5+ (not yet live) — mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND.

screens.label: Chat Interface
screens.notes: WI-2 DONE 2026-02-19. 21 tests. useChatSession hook, EN/FR i18n via t(), role=log a11y, error alert, App Insights telemetry. All 4 BackendApiClient endpoints USE_MOCK guarded — real wiring pending WI-20.

screens.label: EVA Portal Home
screens.notes: FACES-WI-A / WI-17 DONE 2026-02-21. 10 tests. 23 product tiles, 5 categories, mock sprint badges. GC Design System only. WCAG 2.1 AA. Live badges deferred to post-APIM (WI-1 Mar 29-30, 2026).

screens.label: Sprint Board
screens.notes: FACES-WI-B / WI-18 DONE 2026-02-21. 13 tests. Sprint selector, project filter, feature sections, velocity panel (SVG sparklines), WI detail drawer (focus-trapped). GC Design System only. Live API blocked on APIM Mar 29-30, 2026.

screens.label: Ingestion Runs
screens.notes: WI-12 DONE 2026-02-20. 11 tests. Cancel guard (running-only), trigger dialog, AdminListPage<IngestionRun>. Mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND (brain-v2 unscoped).

screens.label: Search Health
screens.notes: WI-13 DONE 2026-02-20. 11 tests. Health score colour coding (>=80 green/50-79 amber/<50 red), reindex confirm dialog. Mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND (brain-v2 unscoped).

screens.label: Support Tickets
screens.notes: WI-14 DONE 2026-02-20. 11 tests. Status + priority badges, status/priority filters, PATCH via updateTicket. Mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND (brain-v2 unscoped).

screens.label: Feature Flags
screens.notes: WI-15 DONE 2026-02-20. 12 tests. Optimistic toggle + rollback on error, EvaButton aria-pressed. Mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND (brain-v2 unscoped).

screens.label: RBAC Roles
screens.notes: WI-16 DONE 2026-02-20. 13 tests. Create dialog, delete guard (userCount>0 blocked), delete confirm (userCount=0), full CRUD. Mock via VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND (brain-v2 Sprint 5+ not yet live).

screens.label: FinOps Dashboard
screens.notes: WI-21 PLANNED. Period toggle, bar chart, persona table, tenant heatmap, budget alerts, CSV export.

screens.label: DevOps Health Dashboard
screens.notes: WI-22 PLANNED. Health banner + auto-refresh 60s, service grid, pipeline table, SLA widget, incident drawer.

screens.label: Devbench Review Demo
screens.notes: Root demo page — select work package, trigger agent run, view diff + rationale.

screens.label: Devbench Projects
screens.notes: Work package list + create panel.

screens.label: Devbench Context Bundles
screens.notes: Context bundle management — upload/view file bundles fed to agent.

screens.label: Devbench Runs
screens.notes: Run history list, status polling, artifact download.

screens.label: Devbench Settings
screens.notes: Local preferences — model endpoint, mock mode toggle, theme.

Entry point for all EVA users. Shows available personas (jp_user, jr_admin, developer, auditor, citizen, etc.) as cards. Selecting a persona personalises the navigation layout, feature flags, and default route. Supports EN/FR language toggle. MFA redirect handled here. WCAG 2.1 AA. Phase 3.
screens.label: Login — Select Your EVA Experience

screens.notes: Post-login landing page. Adapts tile grid, navigation menu, and quick-actions based on active persona. Includes persona switcher chip in header. Persona preference persisted via PATCH /v1/auth/persona/select.
screens.label: My EVA — Personalised Home

screens.notes: Full EVA DA chat with all RAG modes: semantic, keyword, hybrid, re-ranked, multi-hop. Mode picker surfaced as segmented control. Streaming responses via SSE. Chat history sidebar (session list + delete). Citation panel. Feedback thumbs-up/down. Full WCAG 2.1 AA: role=log, live=polite, focus management. EN/FR i18n. Phase 3 — wiring: POST /v1/eva-da/chat replaces jp-spark /api/conversation.
screens.label: EVA DA — Chat

screens.notes: Unified data loading screen: drag-and-drop file upload, folder/tag assignment, URL scrape (preview + submit), ingestion run status table with cancel guard. Consolidates jp-spark /content + /urlscrapper into portal route. WCAG 2.1 AA. EN/FR. Phase 3.
screens.label: EVA DA — Data Loading

screens.notes: Keyword + semantic search with saved searches and browse history. Results show document excerpts with citations. Filter by folder/tag/date. WCAG 2.1 AA. EN/FR. Phase 3.
screens.label: EVA DA — Search

screens.notes: CSV/Excel tabular data analysis via LLM. Upload file, pose questions, get back streamed narrative + chart images. Mirrors jp-spark /tda but hosted in portal. WCAG 2.1 AA. EN/FR. Phase 3.
screens.label: EVA DA — Tabular Data Analysis

screens.notes: Browse the ingested knowledge base: folder tree, tag-based facets, document cards with metadata (source, ingestion date, chunk count). Read-only. WCAG 2.1 AA. EN/FR. Phase 3.
screens.label: EVA DA — Knowledge Base

screens.notes: Admin view of all collected thumbs-up/down + text feedback from chat sessions. Filter by date/rating/session. CSV export. Used by AI governance (19-ai-gov) review cycle. WCAG 2.1 AA. EN/FR. Phase 3.
screens.label: EVA DA — Feedback History

screens.notes: Upload document → select target language → translate and write back to folder. Mirrors jp-spark /translator but hosted in portal. WCAG 2.1 AA. EN/FR. Phase 3.
screens.label: EVA DA — Document Translator

screens.notes: Portal-face route embedding the ADO Dashboard (38-ado-poc / 39-ado-dashboard). Sprint selector, project/WI filter, velocity chart. Persona-aware: developer sees own WIs first; admin sees cross-project view. Phase 3.
screens.label: ADO Command Center

screens.notes: Portal-face route that embeds the model-explorer-ui and model-graph-explorer from 37-data-model. Reads from the live ACA model-api (https://marco-eva-data-model.*). Developer + admin visible. Phase 3.
screens.label: EVA Data Model Explorer

screens.notes: Promptfoo adversarial test results surfaced in portal. Trigger a red-team run, view per-prompt pass/fail, vulnerability categories (OWASP LLM Top 10), export report. Admin-only. Phase 4.
screens.label: Red Teaming Dashboard

screens.notes: Citizen-facing AI knowledge management assistant (20-assistme) embedded in portal. Topic-card entry plus free-form chat. Bilingual. No auth required for citizen persona. WCAG 2.1 AA. Phase 3.
screens.label: AssistMe — Citizen AI Assistant

screens.notes: Create and manage named accessibility themes: high-contrast, large-text, reduced-motion, forced-colours. Preview live. Each theme maps to a Fluent UI token set + GC Design System overrides. Active theme applies system-wide. WCAG 2.1 AA (including the editor itself). Phase 3.
screens.label: Accessibility Themes

screens.notes: Companion to TranslationsPage — groups all literals by screen ID so a translator can focus on one screen at a time. Screen selector dropdown, filter by EN/FR coverage gap. Inline edit, bulk CSV import/export. Clicking a screen name jumps to its live route in a side-by-side preview panel. Phase 3.
screens.label: i18n Literals — By Screen

screens.notes: Second logging lane: application/structural logs (INFO/WARN/ERROR/FATAL) vs AuditLogsPage which holds PIPEDA-scoped user-action audit trail. Filter by level, service, time range. Export to CSV/JSONL. Read-only. Auditor + admin roles. WCAG 2.1 AA. Phase 3.
screens.label: System Logs

screens.notes: RACI-style matrix view: roles on columns, responsibilities/actions on rows. Colour-coded cells (R/A/C/I). Printable. Read-only admin view driven by the roles + responsibilities model. Feeds onboarding docs. Phase 3.
screens.label: Roles and Responsibilities

screens.notes: Allows admin or support role to temporarily 'Act As' another user or persona for troubleshooting, demo, and elevated workflows. Active session shown as persistent orange banner. Ends on explicit 'End Act-As' action or tab close. All actions during Act-As session are audit-logged with both real identity and assumed identity. PIPEDA safeguard: time-boxed (configurable, default 30 min). Phase 3.
screens.label: Act As — Elevated Operations
